query: SELECT p.id, p.name, p.prefecture, COUNT(s.id) as seller_count FROM products p LEFT JOIN sellers s ON p.id = s.productId GROUP BY p.id, p.name, p.prefecture HAVING seller_count > 0 LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2xzt5HQKEQX5mEg.fe2b3777904e --database aXrCUMBv7Ngvrxv9W3BQsf --execute SELECT p.id, p.name, p.prefecture, COUNT(s.id) as seller_count FROM products p LEFT JOIN sellers s ON p.id = s.productId GROUP BY p.id, p.name, p.prefecture HAVING seller_count > 0 LIMIT 5;
